headline: ING’s First AI Agent Payment Puts Fee Growth Story In Focus
summary: ING Bank NV, together with Worldline and Mastercard, has completed what it describes as Europe's first end to end AI agent initiated payment in a live production setting. The transaction involved an AI agent triggering a retail payment that was authenticated and approved by the user within existing European payment infrastructure. This marks a new test case for AI driven consumer payments using ING's banking rails and partner technology. For investors watching ENXTAM:INGA, this AI payment...
